title: What exactly WAS Evangelions budget
wikitext:
[]: What exactly WAS Evangelion's budget?             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Nov 17, 2006 1:11 pm And some other anime in general. There is very little information available anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Nov 17, 2006 1:44 pm [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] I don't have an exact number, but this seems about right as far as EVA's concerned. Seriously though, I doubt anyone other than Gainax people can give you an exact number nowadays. Especially since EVA's over ten years old.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Fri Nov 17, 2006 3:29 pm TriLink12 wrote: [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] I don't have an exact number, but this seems about right as far as EVA's concerned. Seriously though, I doubt anyone other than Gainax people can give you an exact number nowadays. Especially since EVA's over ten years old.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Nov 17, 2006 3:55 pm 10 bux

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 17, 2006 4:08 pm I'd say it was tree-fitty.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Nov 17, 2006 5:22 pm FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-NINE US DOLLARS FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-NINE US DOLLARS FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-NINE US DOLLARS FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-NINE US DOLLARS FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-NINE US DOLLARS

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 17, 2006 7:42 pm 42. *nod*

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Fri Nov 17, 2006 7:57 pm I'm actually curious to know the real budget...I think I remember reading that they had limited resources but they still had quite some money if i'm not mistaken...anyone know the amount?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 17, 2006 8:48 pm i dun think it matter how much it costs

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Fri Nov 17, 2006 9:02 pm I feel dumb for not realizing until now, having read thru the thread twice, that this refers to the production of the anime, not how much money did Gendo and his ilk have to play with.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 17, 2006 10:58 pm TriLink12 wrote: [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Fri Nov 17, 2006 11:09 pm Reichu wrote: I'd say it was tree-fitty.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Nov 18, 2006 6:33 am ...Yes of course. Now that the initial faggotry is out of the way does anyone actually know or know where to find out?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Nov 18, 2006 4:36 pm You mean with the myriad random factoids peddled out about Evangelion, they haven't disclosed something so elementary? With all the fan inquisition over the years, has the case turned out that it's a question they wouldn't answer, or that no one ever thought to ask?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 19, 2006 12:10 am Japanese sites might have it, but "Evangelion + budget" turn up over a thousand results and I'm not familiar with finance-related language (so that I might narrow things down). Maybe John Oppenheimer can find out. ("Ask John" at AnimeNation.)

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 19, 2006 3:23 am i look at a ton of sites...adding words like "production"...and outting words like "amazon, ebay"... i thought finding something like this would be easy

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Nov 20, 2006 10:54 am Szmitten wrote: ...Yes of course. Now that the initial faggotry is out of the way does anyone actually know or know where to find out?
summary:
[]: What exactly WAS Evangelion's budget?             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Nov 17, 2006 1:11 pm And some other anime in general. There is very little information available anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Nov 17, 2006 1:44 pm [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] I don't have an exact number, but this seems about right as far as EVA's concerned. Seriou
